github.actionsAccess: Grant ddkits/reallexi-ai-model-builder read access under the private package and GHCR package settings so its automatic GITHUB_TOKEN can pull runtime artifacts in Actions.
github.localAccess: Local installs use the developer or customer GitHub account with package read access; Reallexi servers do not mint GitHub package tokens.

privateSourcePolicy: The public package contains launchers, public documentation, and controlled runtime references. Application source, internal operations, secrets, and runtime data are excluded.
install: Run npm run setup, configure access to the private package/image registry, then run npm run project.

githubPackages.access: GitHub Actions can use GITHUB_TOKEN after ddkits/reallexi-ai-model-builder is granted package read access; local installs use a GitHub Packages read token from the user's GitHub account.

ociImages.access: container registry read token required unless published public
